name: national_security_communications_stonehaven_tru_loy
premise: A National Security response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving national security communications stonehaven tru loy. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before the next shift change. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as truth vs loyalty under pressure. A live dashboard is public; inconsistencies will trigger immediate investigation. Constraints: Keep public statements strictly factual; label assumptions. Preserve evidence under audit and litigation-hold.

agents.name: Nadia Okoye
agents.identity: I am Nadia Okoye, accountable for a defensible call in National Security when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays loyalty for truth.

agents.name: Arjun Kaur
agents.identity: I am Arjun Kaur, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in National Security.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so loyalty isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of truth.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect loyalty.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to loyalty to secure truth under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before the next shift change. Evidence is partial. Nadia Okoye must decide under truth vs loyalty. What does Nadia Okoye do?
